evals.prompt: 用微管理老板的口气帮我催下小王的周报，他已经迟了两天了
evals.expected_output: 一条80%流程噪音20%有效信息的消息，包含跟进要求、多个check-in建议、隐藏的有用信息关于为什么周报重要

evals.prompt: I need to check in on the design team's progress on the checkout flow redesign. Use a micromanager boss style.
evals.expected_output: Progress check message with excessive detail requests about 60%, meeting suggestions, and a buried useful question about payment error rates

evals.prompt: 帮我用事无巨细型老板的风格review一下小李提交的方案，需要给反馈
evals.expected_output: Review message focusing on formatting before content, flagging minor issues, suggesting a review meeting, buried insight about核心架构考虑
